message:
test(robot): profile filtering and operator loop test coverage, update beads

Comprehensive tests for the profile-aware attention pipeline:

attention_feed_test.go (+140 lines):
- TestPrintDigest_ProfileFiltersBackgroundNoise: operator profile
  suppresses background lifecycle events, keeps action-required alerts
- TestPrintAttention_ProfileShapesDigestAndNextCommand: end-to-end
  test verifying wake reason, matched condition, trigger event, digest
  event count, empty background bucket, and NextCommand includes
  --since-cursor, --session, --profile, --attention-condition flags

wait_test.go (+62/-8 lines):
- Update checkAttentionConditions call sites with new profile param
- Fix race condition: ensure globalFeedOnce fired before override
- TestCheckAttentionConditions_ProfileFiltersLifecycleNoise: operator
  profile suppresses background session-created event so session_changed
  is NOT met; debug profile retains it and condition IS met; verifies
  raw_event_count vs scanned_event_count detail values

operator_loop_test.go (new, 440 lines):
- buildAttentionHintFromSummary: nil/zero/action/interesting/mixed/
  background/large count test cases
- TestBuildAttentionHint_WithFeed: live feed integration
- TestBuildAttentionHint_NilFeed: graceful degradation to "feed:unavail"
- TestCursorChaining_BasicLoop: cursor-based replay handoff
- Profile field presence tests for Wait/Events/Digest/AttentionOptions
- TestBuildSnapshotAttentionSummary_CategoryBreakdown
- JSON round-trip for SnapshotAttentionItem and SnapshotAttentionSummary
- TestDashboardAttentionSummary_FromFeed integration

Beads (.beads/issues.jsonl):
- Update issue status for profile filtering work

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
